sentences.arabic: فَنُّ الخَطِّ العَرَبِيِّ هُوَ نَوْعٌ رَائِعٌ مِنَ الفُنُونِ التَّشْكِيلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija je predivna vrsta likovne umjetnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is a wonderful type of visual art.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَ العَرَبُ الخَطَّ لِكِتَابَةِ الآيَاتِ وَالقَصَائِدِ بِشَكْلٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapi su koristili kaligrafiju za pisanje ajeta i pjesama na lijep način.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs used calligraphy to write verses and poems in a beautiful way.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ أَنْوَاعٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِنَ الخُطُوطِ مِثْلُ النَّسْخِ وَالثُّلُثِ وَالكُوفِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Postoji mnogo vrsta pisama kao što su Naskh, Thuluth i Kufic.
sentences.translationEn: There are many types of scripts such as Naskh, Thuluth, and Kufic.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ هَذَا الفَنُّ إِلَى صَبْرٍ طَوِيلٍ وَتَدْرِيبٍ مُسْتَمِرٍّ.
sentences.translation: Ova umjetnost zahtijeva veliko strpljenje i stalnu vježbu.
sentences.translationEn: This art requires long patience and continuous training.

sentences.arabic: نَرَى هَذِهِ الزَّخَارِفَ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ المَسَاجِدِ وَالقُصُورِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove ukrase vidimo na zidovima džamija i starih palata.
sentences.translationEn: We see these decorations on the walls of mosques and ancient palaces.
